CustomField.formula:
IF(Is_True_Project__c == true,Quote__r.Total_Cost_After_Discount_Ex_Leg_Main__c * Payment_percent__c ,IF( S_No__c == 1, Quote__r.Booking_AmountNew__c, IF( Quote__r.Property_Type_For__c = 'Villa', IF( S_No__c == 2, IF( Master_Payment_Schedule__r.Is_Land__c = true, ((Quote__r.Land_Cost__c * Payment_percent__c)) - Quote__r.Booking_AmountNew__c, Amount__c ), IF( Master_Payment_Schedule__r.Is_Land__c = true, Quote__r.Land_Cost__c * Payment_percent__c, (Quote__r.Total_Cost_After_Discount_Ex_Leg_Main__c - Quote__r.Land_Cost__c) * Payment_percent__c
) ), if(S_No__c == 2, ((Quote__r.Total_Cost_After_Discount_Ex_Leg_Main__c * Payment_percent__c ) - Quote__r.Booking_AmountNew__c),Quote__r.Total_Cost_After_Discount_Ex_Leg_Main__c * Payment_percent__c) ) ))
CustomField.label: NUAmount
